title: Night School: How to Interview Like an AI-First Engineer
description:
Knowing how to use AI tools isn't enough anymore. Hiring managers can tell the difference — and most candidates can't demonstrate what actually matters.

This session breaks down the specific skills, signals, and proof points that separate engineers who understand AI from those who've just played with it.

Your instructor is Ash Tilawat, CTO at Gauntlet AI and the architect of Gauntlet's curriculum — the training program that has become the benchmark for what AI-first engineering actually looks like. Ash works directly with dozens of hiring partners, preps engineers for technical interviews, and gets real feedback from the companies doing the hiring. He knows what's on the other side of the table because he's there regularly.

One hour. Practical. Straight from the source.
